# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Work

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or system work
- [ ] Balance change
- [ ] Content change
- [ ] Artwork submission
- [ ] Idea submission
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release or packaging

## Related Plan Or Submission

Link the related plan, submission, issue, or Discord discussion.

## Scope

List the main files, systems, or assets touched.

## Testing

List what you ran or checked.

- [ ] Automated tests
- [ ] Server compile/build
- [ ] Client compile/build
- [ ] Manual client test
- [ ] Not applicable

## Screenshots Or Clips

Add screenshots for visual, UI, map, sprite, or gameplay-facing changes.

## AI Assistance

State whether AI tools were used. If yes, briefly say what they helped with.

## Contributor Handoff

For an AI-assisted external contribution, paste the exact values printed by
`scripts/contributor-workspace.py handoff`:

- Branch:
- Exact 40-character commit:
- [ ] The exact commit is pushed and the working folder is clean
- [ ] I reviewed the AI-generated diff before submission
- [ ] No credentials, databases, release artifacts, or unrelated files are included

## Notes For Review

Call out risks, unresolved questions, or follow-up work.
